ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the data was collected */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Concentration of PM10 (particulate matter with a diameter of 10 micrometers or less) in μg/m³ */,
  "so2" REAL /* Concentration of SO2 (sulfur dioxide) in ppb */,
  "no2" REAL /* Concentration of NO2 (nitrogen dioxide) in ppb */,
  "o3" REAL /* Concentration of O3 (ozone) in ppb */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect, invalid) */,
  "data_processing_notes" TEXT /* Notes on any processing or adjustments made to the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link with weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., PM10, SO2, NO2, O3) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor for better tracking */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the calibration process */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, malfunctioning, offline) */,
  "sensor_installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the installation process */,
  "sensor_retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was taken */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the reading was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reading (e.g., μg/m³, ppb) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the reading */,
  "reading_source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "sensor_reading_notes" TEXT /* Notes on any issues or anomalies with the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES station_sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the maintenance was performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes on the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., sensor calibration, system installation) */,
  "technical_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the technician started employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the technician ended employment (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the access event (e.g., purpose, issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for validation */,
  "validation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the validation process in minutes */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Speed of wind gusts in meters per second */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air Quality Index (AQI) calculated from the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)
